title: ferray-window: dpss and chebwin (need numerical solvers)
description: Follow-up from #738. boxcar / triang / bohman / flattop / lanczos shipped as closed-form windows. dpss (discrete prolate spheroidal sequences) requires a tridiagonal eigensolver; chebwin (Chebyshev window) requires the inverse Chebyshev polynomial via the equiripple constraint. Both are heavier than the closed-form set; tracked separately so closed-form follow-up #738 can close cleanly.
